steps.title: Identify the passage structure
steps.content:
The passage introduces a hypothesis: parasites could serve as “a mechanism” for horizontal gene transfer between vertebrate species.

The colon before the underlined portion signals it will explain how.

The underlined portion then describes the process: a parasite feeds on one host, acquires a gene, relocates to a different vertebrate species, and transfers the gene there.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content:
The underlined portion describes a means for horizontal gene transfer.

It describes a means by which horizontal gene transfer might occur among vertebrates. directly names this function: “describes a means by which horizontal gene transfer might occur among vertebrates.” The other three introduce elements not in the passage—
  • A compares parasite susceptibility
  • B explains gene likelihood
  • C contrasts vertebrate and invertebrate mechanisms
.

This matches the correct answer — D is correct.
